prompt: A dynamic anime-style low-angle illustration of two young women in rabbit-themed bodysuits, viewed from below as if the camera is tilted upward and they are looking slightly down toward the viewer. The left girl has blonde hair in short twin pigtails with curled ends, large red bunny ears, and a glossy bright red high-cut bodysuit with puff sleeves, long opera gloves, a sweetheart-shaped chest panel, and 4 round silver button-like discs on the front. The right girl has long straight brown hair, pale bunny ears, and a glossy white and pale pink version of the same bodysuit design, also with puff sleeves, long gloves, sweetheart chest panel, and 4 round silver discs. Both have slim builds, long legs, expressive wide anime eyes, and mildly surprised, curious expressions as they glance toward each other and slightly toward the viewer. Their hands hang loosely at their sides, almost touching in the center. Place them in front of a vast ruined cathedral or decayed grand stone building with broken arches, skeletal metal framework, shattered windows, and crumbling debris, rendered as a soft-painted anime background. Use a dramatic Dutch angle and strong perspective so the architecture leans with the camera tilt and the characters feel towering and close to the lens. Bright blue sky with large white clouds behind the ruins. Clean cel shading on the characters, painterly detailed background, crisp line art, vibrant but slightly weathered color palette, cinematic composition. Add 3 text elements in the upper right area as graphic design overlay: small uppercase text "ARINKO AGENTS", large bold Japanese text "平和島", and a large white handwritten signature-like script overlapping the background.
